title: Full office furniture specification and supply for a 35-person Hunter Valley business
excerpt: A growing engineering firm was moving into a new 600m² office and needed a full furniture package — specified, supplied, and installed in 6 weeks.
challenge: The firm had signed a new lease in Broadmeadow and had a hard move-in date 10 weeks out. They had 35 staff, a mix of open plan and private offices, a boardroom, two meeting rooms, and a breakout area — all needing furniture. Previous quotes from Sydney suppliers had come in 30–40% over budget, with 12-week lead times that didn't fit the programme.
solution: We conducted a site visit within 48 hours of engagement, produced a full furniture BOQ within the week, and sourced through our EOF Group partnership in Lambton — Newcastle-based supply with competitive lead times. We specified: 28 sit-stand workstations with ergonomic chairs, 7 private office configurations, boardroom table and 14 chairs, two meeting room sets, and a full breakout lounge. Installation was coordinated around the builder's handover timeline.
outcome: Full furniture installation completed 3 days after builder handover. Staff moved in on schedule. The fit was within budget, with the sit-stand specification coming in at mid-range pricing through local supply. Post-installation defect walk conducted with zero outstanding items at 30 days.

quote.text: We went from a blank floor to a fully furnished office in six weeks. Joe's team handled everything — spec, supply, delivery, install. We just had to walk in.

metaTitle: Office Furniture Supply Case Study Newcastle | Your Office Space
metaDescription: How Your Office Space delivered a full furniture package for a 35-person Hunter Valley engineering firm in 6 weeks — on budget, on time.
